---
title: "Do Improvements in Economic Development Lead to Better Population Health Outcomes in the US vs. China?"

author:
  - name: "Fei Yi"
    affiliation: "Emory University"
    id: "2609012"
  - name: "Sarah Shao"
    affiliation: "Emory University"
    id: "2608499"
  - name: "Serena Gu"
    affiliation: "Emory University"
    id: "2609244"
  - name: "Tianyi Grace Zhou"
    affiliation: "Emory University"
    id: "2644924"
  - name: "Minna Lai"
    affiliation: "Emory University"
    id: "2599976"

format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
---
